title: 工作场景：会议基础
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation; workplace phrase patterns cross-checked against natural business usage.

units.phrase: From my point of view, we should start with the users.
units.meaningZh: 从我的角度看，我们应该先从用户开始。
units.exampleEn: From my point of view, we should start with the users before discussing features.
units.exampleZh: 从我的角度看，我们应该先从用户开始，再讨论功能。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要每次都说 I think。from my point of view 更适合正式会议表达观点。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合提出观点但不想显得太绝对时使用。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达“从我的角度看，我们应该先从用户开始”。
quiz.sampleAnswer: From my point of view, we should start with the users.

units.phrase: Could you clarify what success looks like?
units.meaningZh: 你能说明一下怎样才算成功吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you clarify what success looks like? We need a clear target before we start.
units.exampleZh: 你能说明一下怎样才算成功吗？开始前我们需要一个清晰目标。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 what is success。what success looks like 是工作场景里很自然的目标澄清说法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合目标模糊、指标不清、需求不完整时提问。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请对方澄清成功标准。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you clarify what success looks like?

units.phrase: Which task should we prioritize this week?
units.meaningZh: 这周我们应该优先处理哪个任务？
units.exampleEn: Which task should we prioritize this week? We may not have enough time for everything.
units.exampleZh: 这周我们应该优先处理哪个任务？我们可能没有足够时间做完所有事。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 which task first do。prioritize 表示按优先级处理。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合资源有限、任务很多，需要团队做取舍时使用。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文确认这周优先处理哪个任务。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Which task should we prioritize this week?

units.phrase: What would be the next step?
units.exampleEn: What would be the next step? I can prepare the draft by Friday.
units.exampleZh: 下一步应该是什么？我可以周五前准备草稿。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 next how do。what would be the next step 更自然。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合会议快结束时把讨论落到行动上。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问下一步行动。
quiz.sampleAnswer: What would be the next step?

units.phrase: I agree with the main idea, but I have one concern.
units.meaningZh: 我同意主要思路，但我有一个顾虑。
units.exampleEn: I agree with the main idea, but I have one concern about the timeline.
units.exampleZh: 我同意主要思路，但我对时间安排有一个顾虑。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要直接说 no 或 I disagree。先承认合理部分，再提出 concern，更容易被接受。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合不同意细节但想保持合作氛围时使用。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达部分同意并提出一个顾虑。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I agree with the main idea, but I have one concern.

units.phrase: Here is a quick update on the project.
units.meaningZh: 这里快速同步一下项目进展。
units.exampleEn: Here is a quick update on the project. The design is ready, but development needs two more days.
units.exampleZh: 这里快速同步一下项目进展。设计已经好了，但开发还需要两天。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I tell you progress。quick update on the project 是工作场景固定搭配。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合站会、邮件、群消息里简短同步进度。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文开头同步项目进展。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Here is a quick update on the project.

units.exampleEn: Who will own this task? We should make the owner clear before we leave.
units.exampleZh: 谁来负责这个任务？离开会议前我们应该明确负责人。
units.commonMistakeZh: own this task 在工作里表示负责，不是拥有这个任务。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合任务讨论后确认责任人，避免没人推进。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文确认谁负责这个任务。

units.phrase: I will follow up with a summary after the meeting.
units.meaningZh: 会后我会跟进一份总结。
units.exampleEn: I will follow up with a summary after the meeting so everyone is aligned.
units.exampleZh: 会后我会跟进一份总结，确保大家信息一致。
units.commonMistakeZh: follow up with a summary 是固定表达，不要说 send follow summary。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合会议结束前主动承诺总结、纪要、下一步。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说明会后会跟进总结。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I will follow up with a summary after the meeting.
